name: llm-wiki-pm
description: PM knowledge base skill implementing Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern. Ingest sources, query a compounding markdown wiki, supersede with auto-link rewrite, crystallize transcripts into decision digests, and search with qmd hybrid BM25 + vector + rerank.

wiki_path.title: Wiki directory
wiki_path.description: Where to store your wiki (e.g. ~/my-wiki or ~/Documents/pm-wiki)

wiki_domain.title: Wiki domain
wiki_domain.description: Domain or scope for this wiki (e.g. "PM, Katalon" or "Personal")
